content.en:
The classics here are all made of the skin of the Extreme Dao creatures, and this material can hold some special information materials, otherwise the general material will not be able to withstand this kind of thing containing the Extreme Dao information, and it will directly turn into powder.

Ye Tian browsed the information here little by little, and soon had some understanding of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

The relationship between the end of the world and the extreme deep sea is equivalent to the mortal world and the immortal world, and the extreme creatures praised themselves as the highest creatures at the beginning, they were born in the extreme deep sea, and they looked down on the creatures of the end of the world at all, enslaved the creatures of the end of the world, and manipulated the life and death of the creatures of the end of the world at will.

During that time, the creatures of the end of the world were indeed only servants of the extreme creatures, and they were not qualified to resist at all.

After all, many Extreme Path creatures have the combat power of the primary perfect controller from the beginning, and they are born to control the Extreme Path, while the ordinary creatures at the end of the world want to obtain the power of the Extreme Path, and many of them are about to break through to the super perfect controller, and they are inherently inferior to the Extreme Path creatures.

The only good thing about the end of the world is that the creativity is enough, and a complete cultivation system has been built bit by bit, while the Extreme Dao creatures rely more on the bloodline and their own Extreme Dao origin.

As the long years passed, the end of the realm began to give birth to the perfect controller of the extreme realm, but they did not attack those extreme creatures in the extreme deep sea.

It wasn't until there were more and more perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm in the Extreme Realms of the Extreme Realms of the Extreme Realm of the Ends of the Realm that the Extreme Dao Deep Sea finally realized that the Extreme Realm was about to break away from the control of the Extreme Deep.

Thus, a great war broke out.

Although the number of perfect controllers of the end of the world, the number of super-perfect controllers, and even the perfect controllers of the virtual realm and the true realm are far from the extreme deep sea, the war still looks at the perfect controllers of the extreme realm.

As long as the Extreme Realm Perfect Masters of the Ends of the Realm win, the war is tantamount to victory.

This war did not last long, it ended quickly, but the Perfect Masters of the Extreme Realm fell in many ways.

And after that, the Extreme Path creatures of the Extreme Deep Sea collectively retreated to the Extreme Deep Sea, and the end of the world was also on an equal footing with the extreme deep sea, and the extreme deep sea did not dare to invade the end of the world.

Of course, the cultivators of the Realm did not dare to step into the Extreme Path Deep Sea.

"It's such a relationship!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.

And this also mentions the space-time ancestral realm, the space-time ancestral realm turned out to be a special world created by the Extreme Dao creatures, which was originally to select and train the servant warriors of the Extreme Dao creatures.

But since that war, the Space-Time Ancestral Realm has fallen to the end of the realm, and it has also become a treasure land of the end of the realm.

However, the space-time ancestral realm is still connected to the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, through which you can enter the Extreme Dao Source Sea, and then you can enter the Extreme Dao Deep Sea from the Extreme Dao Source Sea.

Of course, the space-time ancestral realm can only allow super-perfect controllers to enter, and the above perfect controllers of the virtual realm cannot enter the space-time ancestral realm, nor can they enter the extreme deep sea through this channel.

Therefore, the powerhouses on the side of the Extreme Deep Sea who were not afraid of the end of the realm invaded from the Ancestral Realm of Time and Space.

"Lord of Time, have you ever been to the Extreme Deep Sea?"

Ye Tian looked at the Lord of Time and asked.

"How dare I go to the Extreme Deep Sea!" The Lord of Time shook his head, "If I go to the Extreme Deep Sea, I won't be killed immediately! However, the resources of the Extreme Deep Sea are really rich, and there are a large number of Extreme Treasures, if it weren't for my strength, I really want to go over and have a look." However, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea is too powerful, and in addition to the fact that it is a little difficult for those Extreme Dao creatures to advance to the Extreme Realm Perfect Master, it is really not difficult to become the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller and the True Realm Perfect Controller. "

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

He's really been to the Extreme Deep Sea, and now there's a replica body staying in the Extreme Deep Sea.

The super-perfect controllers of the Extreme Deep Sea can be seen in just a small place, and there are also many perfect controllers of the Void Realm, and they can be encountered occasionally when they take on a task.

And the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm is a top existence on the side of the Realm, and he is not qualified to meet it at all, his status is too high, and in the Extreme Deep Sea, the status of the Perfect Controller of the Void Realm is just like that, only the status of the Perfect Controller of the True Realm is higher.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to look at these materials, and soon saw the information on the entrance passage of the Boundary Rim and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea.

According to the information, there are a total of four passages in the Extreme Realm and the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and these four passages are also called the Extreme Dao Heavenly Gate, both sides have sent heavy troops to guard them, and a large number of magic circles have been arranged, even the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm is not easy to penetrate these four Extreme Heavenly Gates.

"It seems that those four Extreme Heavenly Gates are normal passages, the kind that cannot be closed, and the crack discovered by the Stone Dragon Demon Lord should be a crack entrance that was created after the Great War. Ye Tian guessed.

Maybe there is more than one such crack entrance, maybe there are many.

Therefore, whether it is the Extreme Deep Sea or the end of the world, if the two sides want to sneak into each other's territory, they must take these small entrance passages.

These materials also mention the only supreme force in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace.

Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, those who are not the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm are not allowed to join.

And under the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, there are three subordinate organizations: the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Pavilion, and the Extreme Dao Corps, each of which is very powerful.

However, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea Palace was the real pillar, and a large number of Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers were united, and I was afraid that it would be enough to destroy the Eternal Ruins in an instant.

"I'm afraid those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the end of the realm also have a similar alliance!" Ye Tian guessed, but he was not qualified to contact that kind of alliance now.

Not long after, Ye Tian saw another piece of information.

"Extreme Dao Genius Battle!"

This is a local battle between the end of the realm and the extreme path creatures, the two sides enter a special place, and the strong people sent out are only super-perfect controllers at most, and they are not allowed to join the existence above the perfect controllers of the virtual realm.

This is one way to resolve conflicts, and the winner of the Extreme Genius Battle can also receive valuable resource rewards.

"Lord of Time, have you ever participated in the Extreme Dao Genius Battle?" Ye Tian asked.

"No!" the Lord of Time shook his head, "In the last Extreme Dao Genius Battle, I hadn't become a super-perfect master, so how could I be qualified to participate! The end of the realm is also the perfect controller of the extreme realm is qualified to touch the extreme deep sea, the level of the super perfect master, the number is not equal at all, and the fraction of people does not know how many times it is us. So, we're just sending some clones of the will into the dead. For example, in the last session, more than 1,000 super perfect controllers participated, and in the end, only 36 super perfect controllers were commanded, and all the others died. Fortunately, it's just a dead will clone, so it's still within the range of bearing, if it's really completely dead, the end of the world can't accept it. "

"I see. Ye Tian understood, "Then when is the next Extreme Dao Genius Battle?"

"It didn't take long for it to start after 3.8 billion eternal years, and generally when there were only 100 million eternal years left, you could apply. Endless Lord, do you want to participate?" said the Lord of Time.

"Well, let's participate!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Okay, I'll participate too, even if it's sent to death, but if you are lucky enough to survive, it will be of great benefit. Moreover, the place where the Extreme Dao Genius Battle is located is itself a rare treasure land, and it is worth it just to enter there!"
